scoringPlays.text: Terrance Gibbs 1 Yd Run (Tripp Bryant Kick)
Matthew Wilson 6 Yd Run (Dominic De Freitas Kick)
Weston Bryan 3 Yd Run (Two-Point Pass Conversion Failed)
Marcus Sanders Jr. 32 Yd pass from JC French IV (Tripp Bryant Kick)
Dominic De Freitas 27 Yd Field Goal

videos.headline: Terrance Gibbs' rushing TD gets Georgia Southern on the board
videos.description: Terrance Gibbs powers in a 1-yard rushing touchdown to put Georgia Southern on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Terrance Gibbs’ rushing TD gets Georgia Southern on the board) 2025/12/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dorrian Smith picks off App State's QB Noah Gillon
videos.description: Georgia Southern's Dorrian Smith picks off App State QB Noah Gillon.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dorrian Smith picks off App State's QB Noah Gillon) 2025/12/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia Southern gets interception in the red zone
videos.description: Georgia Southern's Tracy Hill Jr. grabs an interception to prevent Appalachian State from scoring a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Southern gets interception in the red zone) 2025/12/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Matthew Wilson gets App State on the board before half
videos.description: Matthew Wilson scores a touchdown for App State and cuts into Georgia Southern's lead before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Matthew Wilson gets App State on the board before half) 2025/12/29 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Tripp Bryant kicks 36-yard field goal) 2025/12/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Weston Bryan's rushing TD extends Georgia Southern's lead
videos.description: Weston Bryan slices through the middle and powers in a 3-yard rush to extend Georgia Southern's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Weston Bryan’s rushing TD extends Georgia Southern’s lead) 2025/12/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dorrian Smith picks off Noah Gillon for a second time
videos.description: Dorrian Smith intercepts App State QB Noah Gillon for a second time.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dorrian Smith picks off Noah Gillon for a second time) 2025/12/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: JC French IV throws 32-yard TD pass for Georgia Southern
videos.description: JC French IV airs out a 32-yard pass to Marcus Sanders Jr. for a Georgia Southern touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (JC French IV throws 32-yard TD pass for Georgia Southern) 2025/12/29 ESHEET
